text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari ho gaya. Tumhara darr sirf task complete karne ka nahi, balki rukne par poora ghar hil jaane ka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ruke toh khandaan doob jayega wali feeling fixed hai. Isliye rona bhi postpone kar deti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se family-linked duty pressure mirror karna.
text: Tum apni feeling ko side pe rakhkar parivaar ki safety ko front seat de rahi ho, aur woh bahut bhari pad raha hai.

strategy_intent: Metro employment + family debt reality mein emotion normalize and worth separate karna.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon? Aaj ke liye practical mini steps chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal par 3 sub-10-min duty-fit options dena.
text: Aaj ke liye 3 tiny options: (1) 5 min slow breathing 4-in 6-out; (2) EMI sheet mein sirf 'next due + available amount' note karo; (3) trusted family member ko 2-line update bhejo: 'pressure high hai, kal 10 min call chahiye'. Jo easiest lage, pehle woh karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing se start karungi, saans abhi heavy hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen suggestion ko step-by-step execute karwana once.
text: Pehle seedha baitho, shoulders dheere loose karo. Phir 4 count inhale, 6 count exhale, 8 rounds karo. Phir bolo: 'abhi ek step kaafi hai.' Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: 8 rounds ke baad pressure halka feel ho raha hai. Head bhi thoda clear hai.

text: Layoff climate mein uncertainty structural hoti hai, personal failure ka signal nahi. Is framing se self-blame ka load dheere kam hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Family ko update dena abhi bhi tough lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: 2 concise script options देना for controlled sharing.
text: Do short lines rakho: (1) 'Pressure high hai, main plan pe kaam kar raha hoon.' (2) 'Aaj detail mushkil hai, kal shaam call pakki.' Isse clarity bhi rahegi aur overload bhi kam hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, short lines se control milta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty intact + sustainable pace mirror karna.
text: Tum zimmedari nibha rahe ho, bas use sustainable pace mein handle karne ki jagah bana rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat mein fir pressure aata hai ki kal deliver na hua toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk + Lens E se future-performance fear mirror.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari hua. Raat mein kal ka performance pressure bada lagta hai, isliye darr aur intense ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi, phir neend टूटती hai aur thakan chipki rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night fatigue response normalize and validate effort.
text: Aise daur mein broken sleep aur chipki thakan common hai, weakness ka nishan nahi. Tumhare lagatar chhote steps hi real progress hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, kal ab thoda clearer lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ready state pe concise 3-block next-day plan देना.
text: Kal ka short flow: 5 min breathing, 20 min focused bug-fix block, 10 min EMI note update. Teen blocks enough hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab dil pehle se halka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final structural reframe on recovery timeline.
text: Layoff uncertainty aur debt stress se nikalna gradual hota hai; consistent small steps hi long-term stability dete hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab lagta hai sambhal lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se current steadiness ko kal continuity se link karna.
text: Aaj ka yeh steady rhythm kal repeat hua toh heavy wave dheere dheere chhoti padti jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, aaj ke liye enough hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close pe do tiny continuation steps without extra load.
text: Sone se pehle 6 dhimi saans lo aur kal ke 3 block notes mein tick-box likh do. Bas itna hi, aaj ka kaam poora.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ye structural endurance hi mera vikalp hai
text: EMI bounce ke baad bhi extra freelance le raha hoon, kyunki ye structural endurance hi mera vikalp hai. Thakne ka waqt nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty-role frame mirror karna first response mein.
text: Tum apne aap ko duty mode mein rakhe hue ho, jahan 'endurance' tumhare liye choice nahi, zaroorat ban gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thakne ka waqt nahi. Tier-2 city mein ghar walon ko lagta hai MNC life aaram se chalti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se family-expectation linked pressure mirror karna.
text: Tum par ghar ki umeed ka itna bojh hai ki apni halat batane ki bhi jagah nahi bach rahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ye structural endurance hi mera vikalp hai
text: Bilkul, isi liye health neglect karke bhi kaam kar raha hoon. Dimag bolta hai ye structural endurance hi mera vikalp hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatements ke baad most draining point identify karna.
text: Din ka kaunsa part sabse zyada todta hai - office shift, freelance block, ya raat ka alone time?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ruk gaya toh izzat chali jayegi
text: Raat ka freelance block. Tab lagta hai ruk gaya toh ghar ki izzat chali jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk warm line + Lens E feared consequence mirror.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari ho gaya. Tumhara darr sirf kaam rukne ka nahi, parivaar ki izzat tootne ka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, pause lene par bhi guilt hota hai. Family mujh par look up karti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se prolonged overwork cycle mirror karna.
text: Kaafi waqt se tum bina rukke dual load carry kar rahe ho, isliye thakan body mein chipak gayi lagti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Core conflict yeh hai ki bahar chal raha hoon par andar se poora drain ho chuka hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 Duty_Based mapping se exhaustion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bahut exhausted ho, jaise duty nibhaate nibhaate andar ki energy lagbhag khatam ho gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, agar sach bolun toh weak lagunga. Isliye ghar ko sab theek bol deta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue protocol: short restatement only.
text: Strong dikhne ka pressure tumhe khud ki sachchai se bhi door kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ye structural endurance hi mera vikalp hai
text: Bilkul, phir dimag mein wahi line chalti hai - ye structural endurance hi mera vikalp hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Izzat + MNC + family expectation context normalize and worth separate.
text: Izzat aur earning ko saath pakadkar chalna bahut bhari hota hai, aur aise टूटना bilkul insani hai. Tumhari keemat sirf nonstop duty se define nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda better hai, par aage ka pehla step abhi unclear hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One-time systemic anecdote from similar world.
text: Family-responsible earners mein yeh pattern common hai - bahar control, andar exhaustion; sirf tumhara nahi, par log ghar ko tension na dene ke chakkar mein bolte nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon? Aaj ke liye mini practical steps do.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal par 3 low-load options देना.
text: Aaj ke liye 3 tiny options: (1) 5 min slow breathing 4-in 6-out; (2) note mein sirf EMI due + freelance target likho; (3) trusted insaan ko 2-line update bhejo: 'pressure high hai, kal 10 min call chahiye'. Jo easiest लगे, pehle woh.

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing se start karunga, saans tight hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Selected breathing suggestion stepwise walk-through देना.
text: Pehle seedha baitho, shoulders dheele karo. Phir 4 count inhale, 6 count exhale, 8 rounds karo. Phir bolo: 'abhi ek step kaafi hai'. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: 8 rounds ke baad pressure halka hai. Dimag bhi thoda clear ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe: financial strain structural not personal flaw.
text: EMI bounce aur extra workload aksar structural stress ka nateeja hota hai, personal kami ka verdict nahi. Is framing se guilt halka padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
